fields.summary: Fix connection pooling bug in database observability
fields.description: Connection pool gets exhausted under high load causing timeout errors. Need to increase pool size and add better connection recycling.

fields.summary: MSSQL integration authentication failures after v2.3 upgrade
fields.description: After upgrading to v2.3, MSSQL integration fails to authenticate even with correct credentials. Error logs show 'Login failed for user' but credentials are verified correct in SQL Server.

fields.summary: Memory leak in PostgreSQL metrics collector
fields.description: Long-running PostgreSQL integration shows steady memory growth over 24-48 hours eventually causing OOM. Profiling shows goroutine leak in query executor.
